query: extreme overexposure blown out highlights white sky photograph
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — overexposed/blown highlights, silhouettes against white sky, washed-out high-key minimalism

response.objective_caption: An interior view showing a doorframe on the left leading to an adjacent room. On the right, a tall wooden cabinet supports a black electronic device with several cables hanging down the front, positioned next to a shelving unit containing books or media items.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An extremely overexposed interior view where blown-out highlights reduce most of the wall and surrounding space to a featureless white expanse, creating abstraction and erasing architectural detail. A doorframe is visible on the left edge. On the right, a wooden cabinet holds a black electronic device with dangling cables, beside a shelving unit containing books or media, though the overwhelming brightness obscures spatial context and surface textures.
